versions.label: Learning + speed controls
changes: Added an in-page explanation panel that explains target, active dots, generation resets, and fitness scoring.
Added simulation speed control (multiple simulation steps per animation frame).
Added semantic version footer and clickable changelog modal loaded from this separate file.
Enabled switching between saved version profiles by clicking version numbers in the changelog.

versions.label: Original visual GA demo
changes: Initial canvas-based GA dots simulation with target, obstacle, mutation, population control, and restart.
Implemented weighted parent selection, crossover, mutation, and elitism.
Added best-trail drawing and generation statistics chips.
